  1. mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles

Uses of Package
mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles

Packages that use mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles
Package
Description
mosqueira.pureStream
 
mosqueira.pureStream.ControladorInterno
 
mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp
 
mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles
 
  • Classes in mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles used by mosqueira.pureStream
    Class
    Description
    LibraryPanel
    LibraryPanel displays downloaded media files and allows the user to: search, filter, delete local files, and synchronize with cloud media.
    PreferencesPanel
    PreferencesPanel allows the user to configure additional settings for the application, such as creating an M3U file, limiting download speed, and selecting the download path.
  • Classes in mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles used by mosqueira.pureStream.ControladorInterno
    Class
    Description
    MainPanel
    Main panel that handles URL input, download actions, and interaction with Preferences and Library panels.
    PreferencesPanel
    PreferencesPanel allows the user to configure additional settings for the application, such as creating an M3U file, limiting download speed, and selecting the download path.
  • Classes in mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles used by mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp
    Class
    Description
    LibraryPanel
    LibraryPanel displays downloaded media files and allows the user to: search, filter, delete local files, and synchronize with cloud media.
    MainPanel
    Main panel that handles URL input, download actions, and interaction with Preferences and Library panels.
    PreferencesPanel
    PreferencesPanel allows the user to configure additional settings for the application, such as creating an M3U file, limiting download speed, and selecting the download path.
  • Classes in mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles used by mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles
    Class

    PreferencesPanel
